'''yongathaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:rubefacient|rubefacient]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-ng-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rubefacient|rubefacient]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| yongathaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:yongathithi|yongathithi]] || [[word:yongathiji|yongathiji]] || [[word:yongathishi|yongathishi]] || [[word:yongathiki|yongathiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:yongathuthuthu|yongathuthuthu]] || [[word:yongathujuju|yongathujuju]] || [[word:yongathushushu|yongathushushu]] || [[word:yongathukuku|yongathukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:yongathuthu|yongathuthu]] || [[word:yongathuju|yongathuju]] || [[word:yongathushu|yongathushu]] || [[word:yongathuku|yongathuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:yongathufthuf|yongathufthuf]] || [[word:yongathufjuf|yongathufjuf]] || [[word:yongathufshuf|yongathufshuf]] || [[word:yongathufkuf|yongathufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:yongathethe|yongathethe]] || [[word:yongatheje|yongatheje]] || [[word:yongatheshe|yongatheshe]] || [[word:yongatheke|yongatheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:yongathothotho|yongathothotho]] || [[word:yongathojojo|yongathojojo]] || [[word:yongathoshosho|yongathoshosho]] || [[word:yongathokoko|yongathokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:yongathotho|yongathotho]] || [[word:yongathojo|yongathojo]] || [[word:yongathosho|yongathosho]] || [[word:yongathoko|yongathoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:yongathofthof|yongathofthof]] || [[word:yongathofjof|yongathofjof]] || [[word:yongathofshof|yongathofshof]] || [[word:yongathofkof|yongathofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:yongathĂŻfthĂŻf|yongathĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:yongathĂŻfjĂŻf|yongathĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:yongathĂŻfshĂŻf|yongathĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:yongathĂŻfkĂŻf|yongathĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:yongathĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|yongathĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:yongathĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|yongathĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:yongathĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|yongathĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:yongathĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|yongathĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:yongathĂŻfthĂŻf|yongathĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:yongathĂŻfjĂŻf|yongathĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:yongathĂŻfshĂŻf|yongathĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:yongathĂŻfkĂŻf|yongathĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:yongathĂŻfthĂŻf|yongathĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:yongathĂŻfjĂŻf|yongathĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:yongathĂŻfshĂŻf|yongathĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:yongathĂŻfkĂŻf|yongathĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:yongathĂŠthĂŠ|yongathĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:yongathĂŠjĂŠ|yongathĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:yongathĂŠshĂŠ|yongathĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:yongathĂŠkĂŠ|yongathĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:yongathathatha|yongathathatha]] || [[word:yongathajaja|yongathajaja]] || [[word:yongathashasha|yongathashasha]] || [[word:yongathakaka|yongathakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:yongathatha|yongathatha]] || [[word:yongathaja|yongathaja]] || [[word:yongathasha|yongathasha]] || [[word:yongathaka|yongathaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:yongathafthaf|yongathafthaf]] || [[word:yongathafjaf|yongathafjaf]] || [[word:yongathafshaf|yongathafshaf]] || [[word:yongathafkaf|yongathafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:yongathasha|yongathasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:yongathshĂ«sha|yongathshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yongathrosha|yongathrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yongathmusha|yongathmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:yongathyasha|yongathyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyongathnkshĂ«sha|goyongathnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyongathnkrosha|goyongathnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyongathnkmusha|goyongathnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyongathnkyasha|goyongathnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:yongangathasha|yongangathasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:yongangathshĂ«sha|yongangathshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yongangathrosha|yongangathrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yongangathmusha|yongangathmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:yongangathyasha|yongangathyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyongangathnkshĂ«sha|goyongangathnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyongangathnkrosha|goyongangathnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyongangathnkmusha|goyongangathnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyongangathnkyasha|goyongangathnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:yengĂŠthasha|yengĂŠthasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:yengĂŠthshĂ«sha|yengĂŠthshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yengĂŠthrosha|yengĂŠthrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yengĂŠthmusha|yengĂŠthmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:yengĂŠthyasha|yengĂŠthyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyengĂŠthnkshĂ«sha|goyengĂŠthnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyengĂŠthnkrosha|goyengĂŠthnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyengĂŠthnkmusha|goyengĂŠthnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyengĂŠthnkyasha|goyengĂŠthnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:yongfathasha|yongfathasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:yongfathshĂ«sha|yongfathshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yongfathrosha|yongfathrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yongfathmusha|yongfathmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:yongfathyasha|yongfathyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyongfathnkshĂ«sha|goyongfathnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyongfathnkrosha|goyongfathnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyongfathnkmusha|goyongfathnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyongfathnkyasha|goyongfathnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]

{{wordpage|a6f1c69}}
